title: The Teachings of Master Odan-Urr
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''''The Teachings of Master Odan-Urr''''' were a series of influential [[Writing/Legends|writings]] by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Odan-Urr/Legends|Odan-Urr]], compiled near the end of his life around [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]]. They consisted of his musings and ideas on the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]] and the proper way a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] should act, and were extremely influential in the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] until its end in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2000-11-22 -->''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]''
